title: Omega-3 Supplements: $5 Billion Industry Relies on Fish Waste and Selective Science
description: The omega-3 supplement market, projected to reach $5 billion by 2033, turns fish processing byproducts into health products. But studies show benefits are narrow—helping high-risk groups while posing risks to healthy users. This investigation explores the evidence, industry practices, and quality gaps.
